LanguageData.Odyssey.HoloAI.Settings.Description: Configure how the holographic assistant determines the area covered by the gravship.
LanguageData.Odyssey.HoloAI.Settings.AllowedTerrainsT: The AI may only stand on tiles whose terrain def is listed here.
LanguageData.Odyssey.HoloAI.Settings.AnchorBuildingsT: The gravship area is generated from player-owned buildings listed here.
